author: Ryan Hardy
description: A more productive way to build good typing habits. Compiles advanced typing stats as you take notes. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: Ryan Hardy
manifest.description: A more productive way to build good typing habits. Compiles advanced typing stats as you take notes.
manifest.name: Typing Stats

name: Typing Stats

releases.author: ryyHardy
releases.description:
# [1.0.0] - 2026-07-16

## Added

- First release! \:D
- Live typing statistics collected from editor changes. Stats include:
  - Active time
  - Bursts
  - Corrections
  - Corrections per minute
  - Total chars added
  - Total chars deleted
  - Net chars
- A view UI displaying stats over multiple days.
- Settings:
  - Enabled
  - Minimum burst duration
  - New burst threshold
- Commands:
  - Toggle typing analysis
  - Open typing stat viewer
